content.headline: AI-First Automation: Build an Intelligent, Self-Operating Business
content.subtitle: From custom AI chatbots and lead qualification systems to complex workflow automation with n8n—we build the brains and the brawn of your digital operations. Faster, smarter, and infinitely scalable.

content.pitch: We help ambitious brands replace manual chaos with intelligent systems. We build AI chatbots, automated lead qualification, and end-to-end CRM workflows that run 24/7. Your goals. Our AI-first systems. Efficiency at scale.
content.tagline: Your vision. Our AI-powered automation. Scale without limits.
content.author: DOTR AI Team

sections.title: Automation Challenges We Solve
sections.subtitle: Is your team drowning in manual tasks?

problems.title: Slow Lead Response
problems.description: Leads wait hours for a reply, killing conversion. You need instant, smart engagement to strike while the iron is hot.

problems.title: Disconnected App Chaos
problems.description: Data is stuck in silos—CRM, WhatsApp, Email, and Sheets don't talk to each other, leading to errors and double work.

problems.title: Manual Repetitive Tasks
problems.description: Your best people are spending 40% of their time on data entry and follow-ups instead of strategy and growth.

problems.title: Generic Support Bot
problems.description: Basic bots that don't understand context or your business knowledge—frustrating users and failing to solve problems.

content.empathy_text: We get it. Scaling a business shouldn't mean hiring an army for manual tasks. DOTR uses AI and n8n to build a 'Digital Operating System' that handles the grunt work while you focus on the vision.

content.problem: Manual workflows are the hidden tax on your growth. Every hour spent on data entry is an hour lost on innovation.
content.agitation: The competition is already using AI to move 10x faster. While you're manually qualifying a lead, they've already closed the deal with a smart automation.
content.solution: DOTR builds intelligent AI agents and automated workflows that bridge your apps, qualify your leads, and support your customers instantly. Ship faster, save thousands in overhead, and scale without friction.

content.headline: Don't Just Automate—Add Intelligence to Every Workflow
supporting_points: AI-First, not just 'tools': We build systems that think, learn, and adapt to your business logic.
n8n Specialists: We create complex, multi-app workflows that keep your data in sync 24/7.
Custom LLM Integration: Chatbots that actually know your documentation and brand voice.
Lead-to-Revenue Automation: From the first click to CRM qualification, everything is tracked and automated.
Scalable & Secure: Built with Supabase and modern cloud security to grow as you do.

content.description: We take your business knowledge and manual logic and turn them into an automated workforce. Using n8n for orchestration and OpenAI/Anthropic for intelligence, we build systems that don't just 'follow rules'—they understand your goals. Whether it's qualifying a lead at 3 AM or syncing data across ten platforms, we've got you covered.

content.story: At DOTR, we believe automation is the foundation of any modern business. We combine custom AI logic, n8n orchestration, and deep CRM integration into a cohesive offering. We don't just build bots; we build the 'nervous system' of your company—ensuring data flows where it's needed and intelligence is applied to every decision.
content.mission: To eliminate the routine so humans can innovate. We help teams scale by deploying AI-first systems that are fast, reliable, and deeply integrated.
content.vision: To be the leading partner for companies transitioning to an AI-first operating model, where every workflow is an opportunity for intelligence.

sections.title: The Ecosystem We Automate
sections.subtitle: We connect the tools you already use

content.text: Ready to stop the manual work and let AI take the wheel?

items.question: What is n8n and why do you use it?
items.answer: n8n is a powerful, flexible workflow automation tool. Unlike simpler tools, it allows us to build complex logic, host it securely, and connect almost any API without the limitations of 'task-based' pricing.

items.question: How do you ensure AI chatbots don't lie?
items.answer: We use RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). This restricts the AI to only using your specific company data and documentation to answer, ensuring it stays accurate and on-brand.

items.question: Can you automate my specific CRM or app?
items.answer: If your app has an API or a way to export/import data, we can automate it. We specialize in custom integrations where off-the-shelf solutions fail.

items.question: How fast can we see results?
items.answer: Typically, the first workflow or AI bot is live within 2-3 weeks. We focus on quick wins first to show immediate ROI.

items.question: Who owns the workflows you build?
items.answer: You do. We build them in your accounts or on your infrastructure. We provide full documentation so your team is never 'locked in'.
